createToken(string,string,uint256,uint8).notice: Creates a fungible HTS token. Treasury and initial supply recipient is msg.sender. Sends msg.value as HBAR to the HTS precompile (required for creation fee).

mintToken(address,uint256).notice: Mints additional supply to the token's treasury. Caller must hold supply key.

userdoc.notice: Creates and mints fungible HTS tokens via the HTS precompile at 0x167.
